title: Phonk Edits Overview

title: Tailwind Tips and Tricks
content: Useful Tailwind CSS utilities, responsive layouts, and quick component patterns for building fast UIs.

title: JavaScript Array Methods
content: Examples for map, filter, reduce, find, sort and chaining array methods with practical use-cases.

title: DOM Events Reference
content: Learn about click, input, change, submit, and keyboard events, plus delegation and best practices.

title: Building a Simple Search
content: Techniques for building a client-side search index, scoring results, and rendering snippets.

title: Suvie & Keith — Official Site
content: Official website information and links to projects, galleries, and contact details.

title: VFX Overlays and Shockwaves
content: A curated set of VFX overlays, shockwave animations, and tips for compositing in editors.

title: SFX: Whooshes and Impacts
content: Sound effects collection focusing on transitional whooshes, impacts, and ambience.

title: Deploying Node Apps
content: Steps for deploying Node.js applications to common hosting providers and configuration tips.

title: About Suvie Search
content: Suvie Search is a small demo search engine showcasing client-side indexing and simple relevance scoring.
